regions.comment: shared sprite atlas — column-major 4×N sprites. Sprite-start addresses below are derived from `LDA #lo;STA &1194; LDA #hi;STA &1195` patterns in CODE/CODE2/CODE3 plus the LEVD2 enemy-ptr-table entries that point into this region. Boundaries are approximate where the code references don't pin them down — refine as we learn more.

palette_top — only [0..11] are read by the IRQ; [12..15] are present but unused. DEFAULT bytes are the scenario-1 palette (red/yellow). Scenarios 2-4 are loaded by Loader2 PROCL34 / PROCL56 / PROCL78 which `READ T%?&493F` 16 bytes each from DATA at lines 1160 / 1180 / 1200 (dispatched from L%=?&9D at lines 940-970).
palette_bottom — scoreboard zone, always black/blue/cyan/white. Same 12-effective-entries layout as palette_top.

comments.0x4900: Common prologue saves A/X/Y. Tests User VIA IFR bit 7 (T1 IRQ pending) → if so, jumps to irq_palette_split_b for the bottom palette. Otherwise tests sysVIA IFR bit 7 (vsync); if not vsync, chains immediately. Vsync path re-primes UVIA T1 (BC34 cycles ≈ mid-frame), then writes palette_top[0..11] → &FE21.
comments.0x497E: Called by Loader2 line 1000 (CALL&497E). Saves the prior IRQ1V at zp_old_irq_vec_lo/hi, installs irq_palette_split as the handler, primes UVIA T1L-H + IER + ACR for the mid-frame timer.
